title: Entity Texture Changer
description: Apply new textures to entities by providing a download link
body:
## Description

Entity Texture Changer allows server owners to replace the texture of an entity without requiring users to first download a resource pack by providing a link to the texture ingame.

### How to use:

1. Get the item from the creative menu
2. Right click a mob
3. Paste or enter a link to a webpage hosting an image
4. All player clients will now download that image and display it on the entity


**Notice: This mod only allows you to change textures not models.**
